subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by those who hastened toward the sanctuary of Thy nearness and attained not unto the Dawning-Place [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بالذین سرعوا الی شطر قربک و مابلغوا الی مطلع
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love as fire, @love of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
